chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3666 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "كَفَّارَةُ عَمَلِ اَلسُّلْطَانِ قَضَاءُ حَوَائِجِ اَلْإِخْوَانِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3666 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The expiation for working for the ruler is fulfilling the needs of the brothers."
